creator: thomas.brupbacher@cerberus.ch
text:
When trying to install the kde2 port, it fails in kdenetwork2. When trying to install
	kdenetwork2 by itself, it also fails.

Fix: 

No idea.
How-To-Repeat: 
a0028# make
